title_channel_messaging_api_pla.zh: 通道消息传递 API 测试平台

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Channel Messaging API - MessageChannel, MessagePort, iframe communication, and worker messaging demos.
metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: Channel Messaging API 的交互式演示平台 - MessageChannel、MessagePort、iframe 通信和 worker 消息传递演示。

h1_channel_messaging_api_pla.zh: 通道消息传递 API 测试平台

h2_messagechannel_messagepor.zh: 消息通道/消息端口基础知识

h2_iframe_communication_via.zh: 通过端口进行 Iframe 通信

h2_worker_communication_via.zh: 通过端口进行工人通信

h2_port_lifecycle_start_clos.zh: 端口生命周期：启动、关闭、传输

h2_event_driven_message_flow.zh: 事件驱动消息流可视化

h2_channel_messaging_vs_broa.en: Channel Messaging vs BroadcastChannel vs postMessage
h2_channel_messaging_vs_broa.zh: 频道消息传递 vs 广播频道 vs 帖子消息传递

subtitle_a_messagechannel_creates.en: A MessageChannel creates two linked MessagePort objects. Messages sent on one port are received on the other. This enables direct, private communication between contexts.
subtitle_a_messagechannel_creates.zh: MessageChannel 会创建两个链接的 MessagePort 对象。在一个端口发送的消息会在另一个端口接收。这使得上下文之间能够进行直接的、私密的通信。

subtitle_messagechannel_enables_se.en: MessageChannel enables secure, direct communication with iframes. Transfer one port to the iframe via postMessage, then use the channel for ongoing private communication - no origin checks needed on every message.
subtitle_messagechannel_enables_se.zh: MessageChannel 实现了与 iframe 的安全直接通信。通过 postMessage 将一个端口传输到 iframe，然后使用该通道进行持续的私密通信——无需对每条消息进行来源检查。

subtitle_transfer_a_messageport_to.en: Transfer a MessagePort to a Web Worker for direct, typed communication. This avoids the global onmessage handler and enables multiple independent channels to the same worker.
subtitle_transfer_a_messageport_to.zh: 将 MessagePort 传递给 Web Worker 以实现直接的、类型化的通信。这样可以避免使用全局 onmessage 处理程序，并允许多个独立的通道连接到同一个 Worker。

subtitle_send_multiple_ports_for_s.en: Send multiple ports for separate concerns (e.g., one for data, one for control signals).
subtitle_send_multiple_ports_for_s.zh: 为不同的用途发送多个端口（例如，一个用于数据，一个用于控制信号）。

subtitle_ports_have_distinct_lifec.en: Ports have distinct lifecycle states. Understanding start(), close(), and transfer semantics is crucial for correct usage.
subtitle_ports_have_distinct_lifec.zh: 端口具有不同的生命周期状态。理解 start()、close() 和 transfer 的语义对于正确使用端口至关重要。

subtitle_when_using_addeventlisten.en: When using addEventListener (not onmessage), you must call port.start() explicitly. The onmessage setter calls start() implicitly.
subtitle_when_using_addeventlisten.zh: 使用 addEventListener（而非 onmessage）时，必须显式调用 port.start()。onmessage 的 setter 方法会隐式调用 start()。

subtitle_closing_a_port_prevents_f.en: Closing a port prevents further messages. The other port can still send, but messages are silently dropped.
subtitle_closing_a_port_prevents_f.zh: 关闭端口会阻止进一步的消息传输。其他端口仍然可以发送消息，但消息会被静默丢弃。

subtitle_ports_are_transferable_on.en: Ports are transferable. Once transferred, the original reference becomes neutered (unusable).
subtitle_ports_are_transferable_on.zh: 端口是可以转移的。一旦转移，原引用将失效（无法使用）。

subtitle_messageport_postmessage_u.en: MessagePort.postMessage uses the structured clone algorithm, supporting complex data types beyond JSON. Transferable objects can be moved (zero-copy) for performance.
subtitle_messageport_postmessage_u.zh: MessagePort.postMessage 使用结构化克隆算法，支持 JSON 以外的复杂数据类型。可传输对象可以零拷贝移动，从而提升性能。

subtitle_transferring_an_arraybuff.en: Transferring an ArrayBuffer moves it (zero-copy, original becomes detached). Cloning copies the data.
subtitle_transferring_an_arraybuff.zh: 传输 ArrayBuffer 会将其移动（零拷贝，原始数据会分离）。克隆操作会复制数据。

subtitle_watch_messages_flow_betwe.en: Watch messages flow between ports in real time. Each message triggers events that propagate through the channel.
subtitle_watch_messages_flow_betwe.zh: 实时观察端口间的消息流动。每条消息都会触发事件，这些事件会沿着通道传播。

subtitle_click_to_inspect_the_mess.en: Click to inspect the MessageEvent object received on a port.
subtitle_click_to_inspect_the_mess.zh: 单击以检查端口上接收到的 MessageEvent 对象。

subtitle_three_messaging_apis_serv.en: Three messaging APIs serve different use cases. Here's how they compare.
subtitle_three_messaging_apis_serv.zh: 三种消息传递 API 服务于不同的使用场景。以下是它们的比较。

subtitle_see_all_three_apis_in_act.en: See all three APIs in action with the same message.
subtitle_see_all_three_apis_in_act.zh: 查看这三个 API 如何传递相同的消息。

btn_establish_channel_with_if.zh: 使用 Iframe 建立通道

btn_setup_data_control_channe.zh: 设置数据 + 控制通道

metadesc_real_time_character_count.en: Real-time character counter with platform limits for Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, SMS and more. Plus reading time, word frequency and byte size.
metadesc_real_time_character_count.zh: 实时字符计数器，支持 Twitter、Instagram、LinkedIn、YouTube、短信等平台，并可设置字符数限制。此外，还可统计阅读时间、词频和字节大小。

metadesc_paste_your_claude_md_and.zh: 粘贴您的 CLAUDE.md 文件，即可获得 0-100 的安全评分。在事故发生前发现护栏缝隙。免费，在浏览器中运行，不发送任何数据。

subtitle_paste_your_claude_md_find.en: Paste your CLAUDE.md — find safety gaps before they become incidents
subtitle_paste_your_claude_md_find.zh: 粘贴您的 CLAUDE.md 文件——在安全漏洞演变成事故之前发现它们。

placeholder_my_claude_md_paste_your.en:
# My CLAUDE.md

Paste your entire CLAUDE.md file here.

The scorer checks for 10 safety categories:
forbidden actions, publishing limits, budget controls,
error handling, backup procedures, and more.

Works with any format — YAML, Markdown, plain text.
English and Japanese supported.
placeholder_my_claude_md_paste_your.zh: # 我的 CLAUDE.md 请将整个 CLAUDE.md 文件粘贴到此处。评分器会检查 10 个安全类别：禁止操作、发布限制、预算控制、错误处理、备份程序等等。支持任何格式——YAML、Markdown、纯文本。支持英语和日语。

title_claude_md_builder_generat.en: CLAUDE.md Builder — Generate the Perfect Instructions for Claude Code
title_claude_md_builder_generat.zh: CLAUDE.md 生成器 — 为 Claude 代码生成完美的指令
